step1.title: Personalize
step1.description: Pick a theme and language. You can change these later in settings.

step2.title: Choose your database
step2.description: Pick carefully. To restart the wizard later, delete the project-root .env file and restart.

sqlite.name: SQLite
sqlite.description: Zero dependencies. All data lives in a single local file; no separate database process required.

postgres.name: PostgreSQL
postgres.description: A standalone database service. Supports concurrency, replicas and remote access.

step3.title: Configure connection

sqlite.pathHelp: Keeping the default is recommended. Absolute or repo-relative paths both work.

postgres.tip: Make sure PostgreSQL is running and the target database has been created.

step3.testIdle: Click the "Test connection" button below to verify before continuing.

step4.title: Create admin account
step4.description: These credentials are used to log into NodePassDash. Save them carefully.
step4.confirmCheckbox: I have saved the credentials above

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.confirmRequired: Please acknowledge you saved the credentials

done.title: Setup complete!
done.description: Database config has been written to project-root .env, admin account created. Restart the service to apply.

restartHint.docker: Docker: run docker compose restart or docker restart <container>
restartHint.bare: Bare metal: stop the current process and run nodepassdash again

done.polling: Waiting for restart, will redirect to login…
done.ready: Service is ready, redirecting to login

errors.statusFetchFailed: Cannot reach backend status. Is the server running?
